name: Microsoft Power BI
description: Power BI is Microsoft's business intelligence platform for creating interactive reports and dashboards. It connects to hundreds of data sources, integrates deeply with Excel and Microsoft 365, and is included in many Microsoft 365 subscriptions.
pros: Strong Excel users will adapt quickly
cons: Sharing requires Pro licence for recipients
use_cases: Your organisation already uses Microsoft 365 and wants BI dashboards without paying for a separate Tableau or Looker licence
Your analysts are heavy Excel users who want to graduate to interactive dashboards while reusing their existing data models and formulas
You need to connect to 300+ data sources — including Azure SQL, SharePoint, and Dynamics — with first-party connectors built in
Your team needs to share reports and dashboards internally at a low per-user cost using the £10/mo Pro tier
